query: SELECT id, title, cdnUrl FROM media_catalogue WHERE cdnUrl LIKE '%.png' AND (title LIKE '%V1%' OR title LIKE '%V2%' OR title LIKE '%V3%' OR title LIKE '%V4%' OR title LIKE '%V5%' OR title LIKE '%spinner%' OR title LIKE '%dungeon%' OR title LIKE '%grey%' OR title LIKE '%starborne%' OR title LIKE '%star wars%' OR title LIKE '%scholar%' OR title LIKE '%middle%earth%' OR title LIKE '%title card%') ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
